extensionDescription.message: AI-powered instant speech translation for all video meetings. Break language barriers with real-time voice translation.

clickToStart.message: Click "Open Sokuji" below to start real-time translation.

quickStartInstructions.message: Configure your API key (OpenAI or Gemini) → Select "Sokuji_Virtual_Mic" as microphone → Start speaking!

gatherTownGuidance.message: Kutumia Sokuji, chagua "Sokuji Virtual Microphone" katika mipangilio ya kipaza sauti chako.

wherebyGuidance.message: Kutumia Sokuji, tafadhali chagua "Sokuji Virtual Microphone" katika mipangilio ya kipaza sauti chako na lemaza kupunguza kelele kwa utendaji bora zaidi.

defaultGuidance.message: To use Sokuji, please select "Sokuji Virtual Microphone" in your microphone settings.

discordGuidance.message: To use Sokuji, please select "Sokuji Virtual Microphone" in your microphone settings and disable Noise Suppression in Discord's Voice settings for better performance.

slackGuidance.message: To use Sokuji in Slack Huddles, please start a Huddle, then select "Sokuji Virtual Microphone" in your Video and Mic settings, and disable Noise Suppression in Audio & Video preferences for better performance.

teamsTitle.message: Sokuji kwa ajili ya Microsoft Teams

teamsGuidance.message:
Ikiwa huoni orodha kamili ya vifaa vya sauti katika mipangilio ya Teams:
1) Zima kwa muda ugani wa Sokuji na onyesha upya ukurasa
2) Ruhusu Teams kufikia maikrofoni na kamera yako unapoombwa
3) Washa tena ugani wa Sokuji na onyesha upya ukurasa tena
4) Ruhusu Sokuji kufikia maikrofoni yako unapoombwa. Sasa unapaswa kuona vifaa halisi na "Sokuji Virtual Microphone" katika mipangilio yako.

jitsiGuidance.message: Ili kutumia Sokuji katika Jitsi Meet, fungua Settings > Devices na uchague "Sokuji Virtual Microphone" kama maikrofoni yako. Kisha fungua Advanced audio settings na uzime Noise suppression, Echo cancellation, na Automatic gain control kwa sauti ya tafsiri iliyo wazi.

desktopCtaBody.message: Maikrofoni wa kawaida wa mfumo mzima kwa OBS, YouTube, Twitch na programu yoyote ya desktop. Windows · macOS · Linux.

browserSitesHeading.message: Unapenda kivinjari? Sokuji inafanya kazi kwenye tovuti hizi — bofya kufungua:

detectFailBody.message: Onyesha upya ukurasa na ufungue Sokuji tena.
